title: arum alpinum subsp. pyrenaeum
intro: Arum alpinum subsp. pyrenaeum, also known as the Pyrenean arum or Arum alpinum, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the Arum genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation and improving overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Arum alpinum subsp. pyrenaeum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
